memory_updates: When Claude plan/history is empty for a day, treat git log, docs/development-log.md, and openspec/changes/*/tasks.md as the authoritative narrative for what moved.
After a breaking HTTP API change (e.g. trigger body shape), ensure README or examples mention the migration path until external callers are updated.
script_candidates: Optional: one-command regeneration of examples/*/charts/*.tgz when Chart.yaml or templates change, if manual updates keep recurring.
workflow_fixes: Decide and document whether artifacts/ and .cursor/hooks/ are committed, partially committed, or gitignored; avoid leaving them indefinitely untracked.
Align example chart tgz policy (committed artifacts vs CI-generated) with release and contributor docs.
For multi-tool workflows, pass explicit --repo to agent-reflect collectors so worktree vs main clone confusion does not skew evidence.
tomorrow_actions: Run `git status` in /Users/jordan/Code/declarative-agent-library-chart and either commit .agent-reflect-and-learn/config.json (and stable hooks) or add ignore rules for local-only paths.
Choose one active OpenSpec change (e.g. agent-checkpointing-wandb-feedback or baseten-inference-provider) and either advance tasks to implementation or mark as parked with a short note in tasks.md.
Run ./ci.sh before merging or tagging if any Helm or runtime paths changed overnight.
